006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.*;
025
026import freemarker.template.*;
027
028/**
029 * {@link ResponseProcessor} that detects {@link FreemarkerView}-typed return values and asks the
030 * configured {@link Configuration} to render them directly onto the response writer.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * Auto-registered by {@link FreemarkerMixin} via
034 * {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest#responseProcessors() @Rest(responseProcessors=...)}
035 * &mdash; callers who add the mixin don't need to wire up this class explicitly. Callers who want
036 * to handle {@code FreemarkerView} returns <i>without</i> adopting the mixin can add this class
037 * to their own
038 * {@link org.apache.juneau.rest.server.Rest#responseProcessors() responseProcessors} list.
039 *
040 * <h5 class='section'>Behavior:</h5>
041 *
042 * <ol class='spaced-list'>
043 *    <li>Inspect the response content. If the value is not a {@link FreemarkerView}, return
044 *       {@link ResponseProcessor#NEXT NEXT} so the rest of the chain runs.
045 *    <li>Read the active {@link FreemarkerMixin} from the {@code RestContext} bean store
046 *       to discover the {@link Configuration} (lazy default if no configuration bean is
047 *       registered) and the optional template-suffix knob.
048 *    <li>Apply every entry from {@link FreemarkerView#getResponseHeaders()} via
049 *       {@link jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse#setHeader(String, String)
050 *       res.setHeader(...)}.
051 *    <li>Default {@code Content-Type} to {@code text/html;charset=UTF-8} if the caller did not set
052 *       one explicitly. FreeMarker's bridge-default {@code Configuration} uses
053 *       {@code HTMLOutputFormat} so HTML is the natural target; an explicit caller header wins.
054 *    <li>Call {@code configuration.getTemplate(templateName).process(view.getAttributes(),
055 *       res.getWriter())} to stream the rendered output.
056 *    <li>When no FreeMarker engine is on the classpath, the {@link Configuration}-typed import
057 *       here fails to load at first use and surfaces {@link #NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC} naming the
058 *       missing dependency.
059 * </ol>
060 *
061 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
062 *    <li class='jc'>{@link FreemarkerMixin}
063 *    <li class='jc'>{@link FreemarkerView}
064 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/ResponseProcessors">Response Processors</a>
065 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/FreemarkerViewSupport">FreeMarker View Support</a>
066 * </ul>
067 *
068 * @since 10.0.0
069 */
070@SuppressWarnings({
071   "resource" // Closeables here are framework-managed and not owned/closed by this class; not a real leak.
072})
073public class FreemarkerViewRenderer implements ViewRenderer {
074
075   /** Default {@code Content-Type} applied when the view does not specify one explicitly. */
076   public static final String DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE = "text/html;charset=UTF-8";
077
078   /**
079    * Diagnostic message emitted when no FreeMarker engine can be found on the classpath at
080    * render-time.
081    *
082    * <p>
083    * Public so tests and consumer apps can pattern-match against the message text without
084    * depending on internal string literals.
085    */
086   public static final String NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC = """
087      No Apache FreeMarker engine is available on the classpath. Add:
088        - org.freemarker:freemarker                       (FreeMarker engine core)
089      Or, for Spring Boot:
090        - org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-freemarker
091          (autoconfigures a freemarker.template.Configuration bean the bridge picks up).
092      Or register a custom @Bean freemarker.template.Configuration with whatever loaders /
093      encodings / output formats you need.
094      See https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/FreemarkerViewSupport for the full matrix.""";
095
096   @Override /* Overridden from ResponseProcessor */
097   public int process(RestOpSession opSession) throws IOException, BasicHttpException {
098      var req = opSession.getRequest();
099      var res = opSession.getResponse();
100
101      var content = res.getContent(Object.class);
102      if (! (content instanceof FreemarkerView view))
103         return NEXT;
104
105      // Resolve the bridge resource (carries Configuration + cached default + templateSuffix).
106      // Fall back to a fresh FreemarkerMixin when the renderer is used standalone
107      // without the mixin.
108      var bridge = req.getContext().getBeanStore()
109         .getBean(FreemarkerMixin.class)
110         .orElseGet(FreemarkerMixin::new);
111
112      // Apply caller-supplied response headers first so a caller-provided Content-Type wins
113      // over the bridge's default below.
114      view.getResponseHeaders().forEach(res::setHeader);
115      if (! res.containsHeader("Content-Type"))
116         res.setHeader("Content-Type", DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE);
117
118      var templateName = bridge.applyTemplateSuffix(view.getTemplateName());
119      try {
120         var cfg = bridge.resolveConfiguration(req);
121         var template = cfg.getTemplate(templateName);
122         template.process(view.getAttributes(), res.getWriter());
123         res.getWriter().flush();
124         return FINISHED;
125      } catch (LinkageError ex) {
126         throw new InternalServerError(ex, NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC);
127      } catch (IOException ex) {
128         throw ex;
129      } catch (TemplateException | RuntimeException ex) {
130         throw new InternalServerError(ex, "FreeMarker render failed for ''{0}''", templateName);
131      }
132   }
133}
